data.title: What's Going On With Tencent Music Entertainment Shares On Thursday?
data.description: Tencent Music partners with Galaxy Corp for G-Dragon's tour, expanding global presence and enhancing concert experience.

data.title: Jim Cramer Says He'd Buy The Dip If Disney Stock Goes To This Level
data.description: Despite a slowdown in Disney's theme parks, which are a major profit source, the stock saw a nearly 3% rise on Wednesday.

data.title: Johnson Controls Intl Stock: A Deep Dive Into Analyst Perspectives (13 Ratings)
Nokia Q3: Earnings Miss, CEO Cites Telecom Weakness And Anticipates India Demand Rebound
data.description: Nokia reported a 7% decline in net sales and missed analyst estimates. Comparable EPS was lower, but net income increased. Margins improved, and CEO expects growth in Q4. Market share declined in North America, but Nokia is targeting other sectors for growth.

data.title: Meta Cuts Jobs in WhatsApp, Instagram, and Reality Labs In Latest Reorganization
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ: META) has initiated smaller, department-specific layoffs in an internal reorganization, part of long-term strategy.
